content.text:
Now I have a clear view of the molecule with atom indices labeled. Looking at atom 8 (N, nitrogen, shown in blue), I can clearly identify its neighbor atoms:

- Atom 7 (C - carbon) - connected by a yellow bond
- Atom 9 (C - carbon) - connected by a yellow bond  
- Atom 14 (H - hydrogen) - connected by a white bond

The nitrogen atom (8) has three covalent bonds, which is typical for an amine group.

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 5514, as indicated by the filename "geomconf_5514.xyz".

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom 8 (N) are:
- Atom 7 (C)
- Atom 9 (C)
- Atom 14 (H)

geomconf_index: 5514

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 8, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
